info.title: WiiUCamera
info.author: ClaudiWolf2056
info.details:
A Nintendo Wii U application that transforms your GamePad into a functional camera with recording capabilities, filters, and a gallery.

. Main Features
. Photo Mode: Take photographs and save them to the SD card.
. Video Mode: Record video clips in AVI format (m-jpeg).
. Effects: Apply real-time filters to the camera feed.
. Integrated Gallery: View your photos and videos without leaving the application.
. Music & SFX: Interface with background audio and sound effects.
. 🇺🇸/🇪🇸 Multi-language: Support for English and Spanish (changeable via the menu).

 Controls
Button	Action
D-Pad / Left Stick	Navigate the menu
A Button	Select / Take Photo / Start Recording
B Button	Go Back / Stop Recording
Touch Screen	Full interface navigation
HOME Button	Exit application (Clean close)

changelog:
v1.6.8
- Added native audio+video synchronization for AVI recording (Muxer).
- Upgraded the Gallery to support video playback with audio demuxing via SDL_mixer.
- Implemented a graphical 2x2 UI with custom PNG buttons for the Camera Menu.
- Fixed DSI Exception crashes related to uninitialized mic threads.
- Added proper hardware freeing (MICUninit) upon exiting recorder.

--

- Se añadió sincronización nativa de audio y vídeo para grabación AVI 
- Se actualizó la Galería para que admita la reproducción de vídeo con demultiplexación de audio mediante SDL_mixer.
- Se implementó una interfaz gráfica 2x2 con botones PNG personalizados para el menú de la cámara.
- Se corrigieron los fallos de la excepción DSI relacionados con subprocesos de micrófono no inicializados.
- Se añadió la liberación de hardware adecuada (MICUninit) al salir de la grabadora.

v1.3.2
👆 Soporte Táctil: Se pulio mucho mas el tactil

🏠 Rediseño del Menú: Botones nuevos y mejora en la interfaz

🐞 Opciones experimentales, QR's (gracias a un proyecto de compartido de Switch que vi por ahi, pronto le dare creditos en cuanto lo encuentre de nuevo) y mucho más!

=//=//=//=

👆 Touch Support: The touch functionality has been significantly improved.

🏠 Menu Redesign: New buttons and an enhanced interface.

🐞 Experimental options, QR codes (thanks to a shared Switch project I found online; I'll give credit as soon as I find it again), and much more!

v1.2.0
FIX: Perfect, error-free photos.
NEW: New editor with effects, improved gallery, and secure saves in v1.2.0.
FIX: The app is much more user-friendly!
ℹ​NEW: Email support, touch controls, and much more!
v1.1.8

 FIX: The app now closes instantly without freezing the console (thanks to libwhb implementation).
 NEW: Simplified installation! Assets (images/fonts) are now packed inside the .wuhb. Just copy one file and play.
 FIX: Corrected video orientation in the Gallery.
 NEW: Added on-screen instructions for camera modes.
